overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Yakuza-style game showing a character in a black suit walking through a neon-lit Japanese city at night. Wet streets reflect the colorful signage as the character navigates through pedestrians in an urban commercial district.

segments.scene_description: The street widens back to asphalt as the character approaches a major intersection. A tall building covered in vertical neon signs dominates the view ahead. Parked cars line the left side, and a club sign for 'BON58' is visible on the right.

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection, approaching the tall building with colorful vertical neon signage. The camera navigates through crossing pedestrians as the building looms larger. Parked cars are now closer on the left, and the wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban district that shifts from a quiet street into a more crowded commercial area. It begins by trailing a character in a black suit along a wet pavement, passing a cylindrical building adorned with red banners under the glow of right-side neon signage. As the camera advances, the environment opens up to reveal a large digital billboard displaying food imagery ahead. The scene then transitions past a stone wall with stairs on the left and a figure in a gold suit on the right, while the pedestrian density gradually increases.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, enclosed nightlife alleyway into a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins on a brick-paved street, passing a stone wall and the neon signage of the Made in Girls club. As the character moves forward, the path widens back into asphalt and opens up toward a major crossing, passing parked cars and the Bon58 club sign. The scene then expands into the heart of the intersection, where the camera navigates through crossing pedestrians while a towering building covered in vertical neon signs looms larger. Finally, the view settles on the vibrant reflections of the colorful signage shimmering across the wet pavement.
